scripts.app: node -e "delete process.env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; delete process.env.VSCODE_ESM_ENTRYPOINT; require('child_process').spawnSync('npm run electron',{stdio:'inherit',shell:true,cwd:'windows app',env:process.env})"
scripts.start:app: npm run build:app && npm run app
scripts.bubble: npm run build:app && npm run app
